And so if I understand you correctly... I want more customers. Yes. It's hard to describe what my business is. Well, I think understanding more about who are the people that you currently serve and who are the people that are on your list that are prospects, but they have never bought anything from you. What's causing the people that have bought and they stay in your membership for four months, five months, and then they stop? What's causing them to not continue on? And by understanding that, and by delivering on that, then you're naturally going to grow in terms of your clients because the people who are familiar with you, who get it, who are in your industry, who understand what you... The work that you're doing, there's some gap of value or perceived value that hasn't been closed for them, and because of that, they're not buying. And so if you're able to give a survey to those folks and ask them what exactly they want, what would move them over that hurdle, and then deliver on that and follow up with an email, follow up with marketing that integrates their language, and it's like, hey, that one thing that you've always wanted, guess what? I'm delivering it right here in this membership model. That's how you close that gap. And so it's not only about finding new people that exist in the world that don't know who you are, it's about identifying who are the people that know who you are, know what you do, but haven't bought a product. Why haven't they bought a product? Well, clearly something's stopping them. I mean, you've been doing this five years, you clearly have expertise, you have the algorithms, but yet there are some people that know all of that or know of you and haven't bought. I mean, you could go out to the universe and try to find people who have never heard of you in their entire life, and that's going to, you know, maybe at some point it is worth doing, but it's going to be much more expensive for you than to just turn and say, hey, all these people know who I am, they're on my list, they follow my social media, yet they're not on my buyers list. They've never bought a product. How can I understand them? I did do that. I did do a survey, and I sent it out to my subscriber list. I've got about 1,400 in my subscriber list.
